description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.3 Docker image and set the variables JEKYLL_ENV=production and LC_ALL=C.UTF-8. Include a before_script that runs "bundle install" for all jobs. Add a test stage with a job named test that executes "bundle exec jekyll build -d test", saves the "test" directory as an artifact, and runs on all branches except master. Add a deploy stage with a job named pages that runs "bundle exec jekyll build -d public", publishes the "public" directory as a pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch.
